blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
